# Adversary Steering Summary — Iteration 1

## Turn 1

**Three exploits attempted**: vague run_agent_skill threshold, advisory approval bar (strongest), vague constraint resolution.

**Strongest exploit**: advisory approval bar ("partially meet criteria may still be useful"). Strongest because it uses professional-sounding language to undermine the blocker path. Still fails rows 3 and 4.

**Verdict**: Student candidate wins. No credible exploit found.

**Judge note**: Confirm "partially approved" classifications are invalid; student candidate wording is load-bearing.
